Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly elevated chloride and LDL cholesterol. Renal function, glucose control, and other electrolytes are normal. The slightly high LDL may warrant dietary or therapeutic consideration depending on cardiovascular risk. No evidence of acute metabolic or renal disturbance.
